THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT MANDEL, RACHEL DEFT SHALL RECOVER POSSESSION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES FROM SAID PLTF, COSTS OF SUIT, INCLUDING REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES & COSTS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION, CALENDAR OF APR-17-1997 MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT RULING IS VACATED. DISMISSAL FILED 3/3/97. THE COURT LACKED JURISDICTION & THE RULING/ORDER IS VOID.
